header.description: Merges data of multiple streams once data from both is available

mode.description: How input data should be merged

append.description: Output items of each input, one after the other

combineBySql.description: Write a query to do the merge

chooseBranch.description: Output data from a specific branch, without modifying it

combineBy.description: How input data should be merged

combineByFields.description: Combine items with the same field values

combineByPosition.description: Combine items based on their order

combineAll.description: Every pairing of every two items (cross join)

numberInputs.description: The number of data inputs you want to merge. The node waits for all connected inputs to be executed.

deepMerge.description: Merge at every level of nesting

shallowMerge.description: Merge at the top level only (all nested fields will come from the same input)

overrideEmpty.description: Whether to override the preferred input version for a field if it is empty and the other version isn't. Here 'empty' means undefined, null or an empty string.

deepMerge.description: Merge at every level of nesting

shallowMerge.description: Merge at the top level only (all nested fields will come from the same input)

overrideEmpty.description: Whether to override the preferred input version for a field if it is empty and the other version isn't. Here 'empty' means undefined, null or an empty string.

fuzzyCompare.description: Whether to tolerate small type differences when comparing fields. E.g. the number 3 and the string '3' are treated as the same.

disableDotNotation.description: Whether to disallow referencing child fields using `parent.child` in the field name

all.description: Output multiple items if there are multiple matches

first.description: Only ever output a single item per match

emptyQueryResult.description: What to return if the query executed successfully but returned no results

includeUnpaired.description: Whether unpaired items should be included in the result when there are differing numbers of items among the inputs

advanced.displayName: Fields To Match Have Different Names
advanced.description: Whether name(s) of field to match are different in input 1 and input 2

fieldsToMatchString.description: Specify the fields to use for matching input items

mergeByFields.description: Specify the fields to use for matching input items

joinMode.description: How to select the items to send to output

keepMatches.description: Items that match, merged together (inner join)

keepEverything.description: Items that match merged together, plus items that don't match (outer join)

enrichInput1.description: All of input 1, with data from input 2 added in (left join)

enrichInput2.description: All of input 2, with data from input 1 added in (right join)

query.description: Input data available as tables with corresponding number, e.g. input1, input2

waitForAll.displayName: Wait for All Inputs to Arrive

useDataOfInput.description: The number of the input to use data of
